reviews.comment: After my flaky friends fell through, Comfort Movers were able to get me moved within 36 hours of reaching out. Communicative, prompt, and beyond fair. Highly recommend for your next move!
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdU5iQS1RRRAB

reviews.comment: The name doesn't lie. They were kind, helpful, willing to go above and beyond, and prompt. Everything made it the new home safely and successfully.  Having moved many times, I cannot say more strongly that these gents are kind and helpful and careful.
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCeUl2Qmt3RRAB

reviews.comment: It was a first time experience with this company and they were on time, professional, and communicative from beginning to end of the day. And they had some heavy things to move, but didn’t mess anything up during the transition. They came prepped and I was at ease the whole time ever on a moving day. I know who I’ll be calling for my next move without a doubt. And I’m also going to recommend to a few friends too. Thanks again!
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtODlDeEdBEAE

reviews.comment:
My partner and I grew out of our 2br apt and planned a move into a bigger space, CMC came through for us big time to make the move a lot easier!

They packed and moved most of our stuff to the new place in one day, fragile items were well wrapped and packed, and the boxes were all carried out and in with care.

Would recommend CMC to anyone moving in the city for the price and friendly approach this crew takes to their work. Thanks again guys!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for taking the time to leave this amazing review! It was a pleasure moving for you both and we hope you are enjoying the new apartment!

reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdGJxdFF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Mateo and his crew came over IMMEDIATELY to help me move my apartment. They were very professional, helpful, and helped me with every task with which I needed assistance.

I was very impressed with how easy it was to work with them. Nothing was broken; all
Items were very gently moved, they didn’t complain at the VERY annoying old sliding elevator door (which wouldn’t open all the way either!), and they all had smiles on their faces
and worked steadily and very hard the entire time.

I hired them to move me a SECOND time, and I plan to use their assistance whenever I need help in the future. Don’t give your money to an impersonal corporation or company that will overcharge money, be rude, breaks things, etc.

Definitely hire these guys! Five stars all the way!! Best customer  experience in a VERY long time.
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQteXJ1Qnl3RRAB

reviews.comment: Young friendly guys did a great job!  Highly recommend them.

reviews.comment: We hired Comfort Moving Chicago for our latest move and they made everything so easy for us. Great communication since the begging. They came in totally prepared and make sure all of our belongings where safe. The whole team is really nice and professional. Definitely recommend and use their service again here in Chicago.

reviews.comment: Great guys! Very efficient and friendly. Showed up right on time and packed us up nicely!

reviews.comment: Comfort moving did a fantastic job moving my bed. They were on time, efficient and did a great job! I would highly recommend their team for a big or small move!

reviews.comment: Awesome moving company. The work was done amazingly and everything came to my new apartment in one shape.  They made sure to wrap everything and made the move so much easier.

reviews.comment: They were punctual hard working polite and treated our belongings with care most of all they were fast and honestly we contacted them short notice and they were truly a pleasure to do business with I'll definitely be recommending them to friends and family one of the most positive moving experiences i've had!!!
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlbllyUDR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
A+++++++
We moved from out of state and threw (literally, it was a disaster...) our stuff into a storage unit so it was not a typical, easy move as stuff was not neatly boxed.  The guys still managed to move everything quickly and orderly - not a single item broke! They ensured the furniture and boxes were where we wanted them before they left and just made the whole process stress-free and 10x easier than I could have imagined.
Highly recommend and truly enjoyed working with them!
